tasks.title: Inspect and Document Current Extension Architecture
tasks.description: Perform a thorough inspection of the existing IELTS Journey Chrome Extension codebase, including popup UI, content scripts, background/service worker, storage, API sync, and AI features. Document the architecture, component interactions, data flow, and communication mechanisms between extension parts in a structured report.
acceptanceCriteria: Architecture report covers all extension parts: popup, content scripts, background/service worker, storage, API sync, AI features
Data flow and communication between components are clearly described
Existing services and utilities are identified
tasks.expectedResult: A comprehensive architecture document describing the extension's structure and component interactions is produced.

outputPlan.description: Architecture audit report for IELTS Journey Chrome Extension

metadata.inputContext: Access to full extension source code under apps/extension/src
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides foundational understanding of extension architecture for targeted fixes.

tasks.title: List and Assess All Existing Extension Features and Their Status
tasks.description: Create a detailed list of all existing features implemented in the extension, referencing documentation and source code. For each feature, assess its current implementation status: working, broken, incomplete, duplicated, or risky. Include features from popup UI, content scripts, background/service worker, storage, API sync, and AI integration.
acceptanceCriteria: Complete feature list covering all extension functionalities
Status assessment for each feature with clear notes on issues or risks
Reference to source files or modules implementing each feature
tasks.expectedResult: A feature status report listing all extension features with their current implementation health and issues.

outputPlan.description: Feature list and status assessment for IELTS Journey Chrome Extension

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Identifies feature gaps and issues to prioritize fixes.

tasks.title: Identify Broken, Incomplete, Duplicated, or Risky Extension Parts
tasks.description: Analyze the feature status report and source code to identify specific broken, incomplete, duplicated, or risky parts of the extension. Highlight critical user-facing issues and architectural risks such as duplicated event listeners, memory leaks, or unsafe DOM manipulations. Document these findings with references to code locations.
acceptanceCriteria: Clear list of broken or incomplete features with code references
Identification of duplicated or risky code patterns
Prioritized list of issues based on user impact and technical risk
tasks.expectedResult: A detailed issues report listing all problematic extension parts with prioritization for fixes.

outputPlan.description: Issues and risks report for IELTS Journey Chrome Extension

metadata.inputContext: Extension feature status report and source code
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides a prioritized list of extension problems to address.

tasks.title: Fix Extension Popup Opening and User Data Display Issues
tasks.description: Fix issues preventing the extension popup from opening correctly. Ensure the popup UI loads reliably and can read and display user data from storage. Modify popup components and hooks as needed to fix data fetching, state management, and rendering bugs. Add error handling and loading states for user data display.
acceptanceCriteria: Extension popup opens reliably on icon click
User data is fetched from storage and displayed correctly in popup
Loading, error, and empty states are handled gracefully in popup UI
tasks.expectedResult: Extension popup UI opens and displays user data correctly with proper state handling.

outputPlan.description: Fix popup root component to handle opening and data display
Fix data fetching hook to read user data correctly
Fix dashboard component to display user data and handle states

metadata.inputContext: Extension issues report, popup UI source code
evidence: user data visible in popup UI
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Restores core popup functionality for user interaction.

tasks.title: Fix Vocabulary Notebook and Word Details Display in Popup
tasks.description: Fix the vocabulary notebook feature in the popup to correctly load and display saved vocabulary items. Implement click handlers on vocabulary items to show detailed word information including meaning, pronunciation, part of speech, forms, synonyms, examples, and IELTS usage. Ensure the read/pronunciation button works with text-to-speech integration.
acceptanceCriteria: Vocabulary notebook loads saved vocabulary correctly
Clicking a vocabulary item opens a detailed view with all required word information
Read/pronunciation button triggers correct text-to-speech playback
tasks.expectedResult: Vocabulary notebook and word details feature fully functional with TTS support.

outputPlan.description: Fix vocabulary list loading and display
Implement detailed word information view with TTS button
Fix or implement text-to-speech service for pronunciation

metadata.inputContext: Popup vocabulary components and TTS service source code
evidence: word details show all required info
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Restores full vocabulary management and learning support in popup.

tasks.title: Fix Text Selection Handling and AI Explanation/Simplification Features in Content Script
tasks.description: Fix content script logic to detect user text selection on any webpage reliably. Ensure the floating toolbar appears on selection with options to explain or simplify the selected text using AI. Fix communication between content script and background/service worker for AI API calls. Add error handling and loading states for AI responses.
acceptanceCriteria: Text selection detection works on various webpages
Floating toolbar appears correctly without breaking page layout
Explain and simplify AI features return valid responses
Errors and loading states handled gracefully
tasks.expectedResult: Content script text selection and AI features work reliably with proper UI and error handling.

outputPlan.description: Fix text selection detection and event handling
Fix floating toolbar UI injection and positioning
Fix AI API call handling and messaging

metadata.inputContext: Content script and background AI service source code
evidence: floating toolbar appears on text selection
AI explain and simplify features return results
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Restores core AI-powered text assistance features in content scripts.

tasks.title: Fix Saving Selected Text, Vocabulary, and Article/Page Content Features
tasks.description: Fix logic to save selected text, new vocabulary entries, and article/page content as reading material. Ensure data is stored correctly in IndexedDB or chrome.storage with proper sync to web app. Fix UI feedback for save actions and error handling. Verify data consistency and no duplication.
acceptanceCriteria: Selected text can be saved successfully
New vocabulary entries save correctly without duplicates
Article/page content saves as reading material
Data sync with web app works correctly
UI shows success, error, and loading states properly
tasks.expectedResult: Saving features for text, vocabulary, and articles work reliably with sync and UI feedback.

outputPlan.description: Fix storage wrapper for saving and syncing data
Fix UI components for saving vocabulary and articles

metadata.inputContext: Storage service and popup save UI source code
evidence: data saved and synced without duplication
UI feedback visible on save actions
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures reliable data saving and syncing features.

tasks.title: Fix YouTube/Video Page Support and Video Metadata Saving
tasks.description: Fix extension support for YouTube and other video pages. Detect video title, URL, and transcript/notes if available. Implement saving of video metadata and transcript as study material. Ensure UI integration in popup and content scripts for video-related features.
acceptanceCriteria: Video pages are detected correctly
Video title, URL, and transcript can be saved
Popup UI shows video-related features and saved data
No errors or layout breakage on video pages
tasks.expectedResult: Video page support and metadata saving features work correctly and integrate with extension UI.

outputPlan.description: Fix YouTube page detection and transcript extraction
Fix popup UI for video metadata display and saving

metadata.inputContext: YouTube helper and popup video UI source code
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Adds robust video page support and metadata saving.

tasks.title: Fix Auto-Highlighting of Saved Words on Webpages
tasks.description: Fix the auto-highlight feature to highlight saved vocabulary words on webpages without breaking layout or causing duplicate highlights. Ensure safe DOM manipulation and event listener management. Make auto-highlight work reliably on dynamic pages and avoid performance issues.
acceptanceCriteria: Saved words are highlighted correctly on various websites
No duplicate highlights occur
Page layout and styles remain intact
Auto-highlight works on dynamic content pages
No memory leaks or duplicated event listeners
tasks.expectedResult: Auto-highlight feature works safely and reliably without breaking host pages.

outputPlan.description: Fix auto-highlight logic for safe DOM manipulation and duplicate avoidance

evidence: no layout breakage on tested sites
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures safe and performant auto-highlight feature.

tasks.title: Fix Vocabulary Review Flow and Pending Review Count Display
tasks.description: Fix the vocabulary review flow accessible from the extension popup. Ensure the user can start a review session, and the pending review count displays correctly in the popup dashboard. Fix review session state management and UI updates.
acceptanceCriteria: User can start vocabulary review from popup
Pending review count is accurate and updates correctly
Review session UI works without errors
tasks.expectedResult: Vocabulary review flow and pending review count feature fully functional in popup.

outputPlan.description: Fix pending review count display and update logic
Fix review session UI and state management

tasks.title: Fix AI Tutor Entry Point and Context Usage in Extension
tasks.description: Fix the AI Tutor entry point accessible from the extension popup. Ensure it can use selected text or page context when available for AI interactions. Fix communication between popup, background, and AI services. Add proper error handling and loading states.
acceptanceCriteria: AI Tutor entry point opens correctly from popup
Selected text or page context is passed to AI Tutor
AI Tutor UI handles loading, error, and success states properly
tasks.expectedResult: AI Tutor feature works correctly with context-aware AI interactions.

outputPlan.description: Fix AI Tutor entry point UI and context passing
Fix AI service to handle context-aware requests

metadata.inputContext: AI Tutor popup and background AI service source code
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Restores AI Tutor functionality with context awareness.

tasks.title: Fix Public API/Search/Import Export Features in Extension
tasks.description: Fix existing public API, search, and import/export open content features in the extension if implemented. Ensure these features work correctly with storage and UI. Fix any broken UI components, API calls, or data handling logic.
acceptanceCriteria: Public API and search features work correctly
Import and export features function without errors
UI components for these features display proper states
tasks.expectedResult: Public API, search, and import/export features fully functional in extension.

outputPlan.description: Fix import/export UI and logic
Fix public API and search client logic

metadata.inputContext: Import/export and API client source code
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Restores data import/export and public API features.

tasks.title: Fix Settings and Configuration Sync Between Web App and Extension
tasks.description: Fix settings and configuration management to ensure consistency between the web app and extension. Fix storage sync logic, UI settings forms, and state management. Handle authentication state correctly and display logged-out state clearly. Add error handling and loading states.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings changes in extension reflect in web app and vice versa
Authentication state is handled correctly
Logged-out state is clearly indicated in UI
Settings UI shows loading, error, and success states
tasks.expectedResult: Settings and authentication state sync correctly between extension and web app.

outputPlan.description: Fix AI settings form UI and sync logic
Fix storage sync bridge between extension and web app

metadata.inputContext: Settings UI and storage sync source code
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures consistent user settings and auth state across platforms.

tasks.title: Add Missing Loading, Empty, Error, and Success States Across Extension UI
tasks.description: Audit all extension UI components and add missing loading, empty, error, and success states. Ensure consistent user feedback during async operations such as data fetching, saving, AI calls, and sync. Use existing reusable components and styles. Add proper error boundaries where needed.
acceptanceCriteria: All async UI operations show appropriate loading indicators
Empty states are shown when no data is available
Errors are displayed clearly with retry options
Success states confirm user actions
tasks.expectedResult: Extension UI provides clear and consistent feedback states for all user interactions.

outputPlan.description: Improve empty state component usage
Add or fix error boundary components
Add or fix loading spinner component

evidence: loading, empty, error, success states visible in UI
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Improves user experience with clear UI feedback.

tasks.title: Test Core Extension Flows Manually and Add Automated Tests
tasks.description: Perform manual testing of core extension flows including popup opening, vocabulary management, AI features, saving content, auto-highlight, and review. Add or improve automated tests for critical flows using existing test frameworks. Fix any issues found during testing.
acceptanceCriteria: Manual tests cover all core user flows without errors
Automated tests added or improved for critical features
Test coverage increased or maintained
No regressions introduced
tasks.expectedResult: Core extension features verified manually and covered by automated tests.

outputPlan.description: Add or improve automated tests for extension features

metadata.inputContext: Extension source code and existing tests
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures extension stability and quality through testing.

tasks.title: Final Validation of Extension Stability and Production Readiness
tasks.description: Perform final validation of the IELTS Journey Chrome Extension in a real Chrome environment. Verify all features work correctly after browser refresh, popup reopen, across different websites, and on restricted pages. Confirm no crashes, no duplicate data, no spam API calls, and proper offline handling. Prepare a final report summarizing fixes, improvements, and remaining issues.
acceptanceCriteria: Extension loads and functions correctly after browser refresh and popup reopen
Features work across multiple websites including restricted pages
No crashes or errors in console
No duplicate saved data or spam API calls
Offline usage handled gracefully
Final report created summarizing work done
tasks.expectedResult: Extension is stable, production-ready, and all critical features verified in real environment.

outputPlan.description: Final report summarizing fixes, improvements, and future work

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Confirms extension readiness for production release.
